summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Resqly V1 UI Refinement Update. All backend APIs (36/36 tests) and frontend features (24/24 tests) passed successfully. New features tested: auto-launch into Consumer app, splash screen, emergency floating action card, 8-service grid reorder, Liquid Glass bottom navigation, Practo-style profile with 3 tabs, family management, prescriptions, lab tests, and emergency request flow.

minor_issues.issue: PATCH endpoints require all required fields (name, relation for family; test_name, status for lab tests) even for partial updates. Should use a separate model with all optional fields or handle exclude_none properly.
minor_issues.impact: Frontend must send all required fields even when updating a single field
minor_issues.workaround: Frontend sends all required fields in PATCH requests

passed_tests: Backend: All 36 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Consumer OTP login with mock OTP 123456
Root redirect to /consumer/login (auto-launch into Consumer)
Splash screen visible on first session load with 2.2s duration
Consumer onboarding for new users
Hero with 'Join Waitlist' button (NOT 'Join Priority Access')
Emergency Floating Action Card with red accent + SOS badge
8 services in correct order: Ambulance, Bystander, Home Care, Home Nursing, Lab Tests, Pharmacy, Pet Care, Doctors
Ranger CTA section with correct text
Liquid Glass Bottom Navigation with 5 tabs (Home, Prescriptions, Lab Tests, Family, Profile) - NO Waitlist, NO Emergency tabs
Profile page with Practo-style gradient blue header
Profile 3 segmented tabs (Personal/Medical/Lifestyle)
Profile completion % visible and updates after save (12% → 24%)
Extended profile fields (gender, dob, marital_status, height, weight, medications, lifestyle)
Family management: Add/edit/delete family members
Prescriptions: Upload/view/delete prescriptions
Lab Tests: 3 tabs (Upcoming/Past/Reports), add/delete tests and reports
Emergency request page with 5-step flow
Service detail pages with Join Waitlist form
Provider login page accessible (Email/Phone tabs)
Admin login with password 'resqly-admin-2026'
All 6 compliance pages accessible (/privacy, /terms, /support, /contact, /delete-account, /permissions)
Interactive features: Successfully added family member, prescription, lab test
Profile save persists changes and updates completion %
